Smile Dental NYC.connection_request:
Hi Dr. Smith,

quick question — do you ever lose patients from missed calls or after-hours inquiries at Smile Dental NYC?
Smile Dental NYC.first_message:
Thanks for connecting, Dr. Smith.

Most dental clinics I looked at lose 10–30% of potential patients because calls come in after hours or don't get followed up properly.

Is that something you notice at Smile Dental NYC?
Smile Dental NYC.followup_1: Hey Dr. Smith, just bumping this up — is after-hours lead capture a challenge for Smile Dental NYC?
Smile Dental NYC.followup_2:
Hi Dr. Smith, one more follow-up.

If this isn't a priority right now, totally understand.

If it is, happy to show you how we help clinics recover 15-20 extra appointments per month.

response_handlers.voicemail:
That's exactly what we fix.

Our system answers in 60 seconds and books the appointment directly into your calendar.

Clinics using this recover 15-20 extra patients per month.

Want a quick 10-min demo?
response_handlers.has_system: Good. Quick question — does it actually book the appointment, or just take a message?
response_handlers.price:
$1,500/month. But let me ask — how much is a missed patient worth to Smile Dental NYC?

If it's $500+, and we recover 3 per month, you're making money from day one.

Want to see the math for Smile Dental NYC?
response_handlers.send_info:
I will. But real quick — what questions do you have right now?

I want to send you exactly what helps you decide.
response_handlers.not_interested:
No problem. Can I ask — is it because you already have a solution, or because you don't see the need?

Just curious so I'm not wasting your time.
response_handlers.interested:
Great. Here's the link: {demo_link}

I'll show you exactly how this works for Smile Dental NYC. Takes 15 min.
